author: 0xrubo
content: <@427491045308235776> <@774033563732541451> is there any standard (or plans to have one) for the `debug_executionWitness` method output? nethermind and reth currently have similar ones, while geth has a slightly different one.

author: jsign
content:
New release of `projects/zkevm` specs and tests: [zkevm@v0.3.4](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.4)
Quick summary:
- `blockchain_test_engine` fixture format support
- Three fixes in the guest program specs reg used input types and input generation.
More details in the [release description](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/zkevm%40v0.3.4).
